text.title: previous_response_id Procedure
text.summary: 4-step procedure to emit a continuity spec.

section.title: Procedure
section.p: Step 1 — Confirm api_flavor (Responses or Chat). If Chat, fall back to message-array mode.
Step 2 — Provision per-conversation session store (Redis / DynamoDB). Key by (user_id, conversation_id) (r2).
Step 3 — Wire fallback: on 404 from id-bearing call, retry without id, store the new id (r3).
Step 4 — Log per-turn id pairs (r5). Emit spec; run scripts/validate-previous-response-id-reasoning-reuse.py.
